produces: source.js — Node consumer of the PowerShell SMTC sidecar; exposes subscribe(onTrack).

satisfies: Uses host.spawnSidecar (does NOT call child_process directly)

rationale: Pure consumer of the sidecar's stdout JSON-line protocol. Debounce is exactly the 150ms specified in the contract notes. Auto-restart on sidecar crash is deliberately NOT implemented because plugin lifecycle is bounded by host lifecycle (ledger A8); the host re-enables the action when needed.
